artifact.name: DRAFT_AGENT_MODE_WORKFLOW_RULES
artifact.canon_status: not source canon; not implementation; not game-system draft content; not final platform OS until promoted
artifact.related_issue: #33 — Epic: Sequence Nexus app-facing game-rule/system design

preservation_guidance.notes: This file supplements existing bridge OS instructions. Do not delete, archive, or replace baseline bridge files based on this JSON alone. If accepted, Codex/local may promote or merge these rules into the appropriate baseline bridge or mode-specific OS file.

upload_guidance.notes: This is a bridge-side structured companion artifact. It should not be added to the permanent ChatGPT Project baseline upload set unless later explicitly promoted.

workflow_rules.rule: Draft Mode should automatically follow a full draft-agent loop before presenting a draft as review-ready.
workflow_rules.clarification_boundary: Ask only for decisions that materially affect gameplay, gameplay app flow, source routing, or project workflow. Do not ask for ordinary semantic, naming, or schema-shaping decisions unless they create a material gameplay/workflow consequence.

workflow_rules.rule: Self-review should state specific changes to be made before revision, not only summarize pass/fail status or describe changes after the fact.
Process or workflow residue must not be inserted into the active task artifact unless it is part of that artifact's deliverable.
Reusable workflow rules should be captured in structured JSON-like form when consistency across ChatGPT and Codex matters.
workflow_rules.notes: Structured capture should supplement human-readable bridge docs, not replace them automatically.

deferred_followup.task: Decide whether to promote these rules into baseline bridge instructions, a mode-specific Draft OS file, or a shared agent workflow JSON/YAML artifact.
Run repo validation after any follow-up bridge/index changes.
